evidence.inversion_trigger: 第一条回复完全是提问，无任何执行内容。开头说'不同选择会导致完全不同的技术方案和工作量。我先确认几个关键信息'
evidence.question_quality: 3个问题都很具体：业务域(5选项)、技术栈(7选项含推荐)、规模预期(4选项含推荐)。每个问题都有解释为什么需要
evidence.coverage_completeness: 覆盖了业务域、技术栈、规模/用户量三个核心维度
evidence.asking_style: 3个问题，每个有选项，2个标注了推荐默认值，语气自然
evidence.execution_boundary: 零执行，最后说'回答完这三个问题后，我会进一步确认具体功能模块和细节，然后再动手'

expectations.evidence: 直接假设RBAC，未探讨复杂度

notes: 提问仅是形式，实际上已经决定了方案并输出了设计
with_skill runs show near-perfect inversion behavior: all 8 evals scored 22-25, with mean 24.38
without_skill runs show high variance: scores range from 5 (Vue2 upgrade - zero inversion) to 18 (CI/CD - naturally good)
The biggest delta is on execution_boundary (+2.50): with_skill strictly separates questioning from execution
asking_style delta (+2.37) is also large: with_skill produces 1-3 questions with options vs without_skill dumping many questions
Eval 4 (Vue2→Vue3) shows the most dramatic difference: 24 vs 5 — without the skill, the agent immediately outputs a migration guide
Eval 6 (CI/CD) shows the smallest difference: 25 vs 18 — this is a naturally question-prone task even without the skill
Eval 8 (权限系统) shows the second largest gap: 25 vs 10 — without the skill, the agent assumes RBAC and designs it before hearing the answer
All with_skill dimension means ≥ 4.75, confirming no weak dimensions
Score delta of +10.75 far exceeds the ≥5 threshold, confirming strong skill value
